case.title: RAILWAY ENGINEERING EQUIPMENT COMPANY v. OREGON SHORT

opinion.h: RAILWAY ENGINEERING EQUIPMENT COMPANY v. OREGON SHORT, 296 U.S. 658 (1936)
RAILWAY ENGINEERING EQUIPMENT COMPANY et al., petitioners, v. OREGON SHORT LINE RAILROAD COMPANY.* No. 631.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Wallace R. Lane and Hervey S. Knight, both of Chicago, Ill., for petitioners.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 297 U.S. 727, 56 S. Ct. 497.[ Railway Engineering Equipment Company v. Oregon Short 296 U.S. 658 (1936) ]
